title: Fresh Bottles
body:
Simple and lightweight resource pack that changes the models and adds drinking animations for baby milk bottles and tippy cups in Nappycraft and PaciCraft, giving you a more immersive roleplay, in-character experience! :D

![Picture of all bottle models on the ground](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/z3cBaNdO/images/052ecd9c6b9e233b086fb585efd923db762a059d.png)

This resource pack is only for 1.21.4, sorry :(
